title: Hello MC Neighbor
description: a minecraft mod that adds items from hello neighbor
body:
# Hello MC Neighbor
> This mod add differents things from the game Hello Neighbor for the ones want to play the game in Minecraft with is friends

## Objects

> There are 6 items for now
> 
> ![all itemss](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd7f3720925e81ef9847b985973850d39b1cf4e1.png)
> 
> If you want to listen the music: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ziaf3RrG80U" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
> 
> And there will be more items

## Blocks

> There are 3 blocks for now
> ![3 blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/143db8802386210c89dd9be7bd25c3af131e1e7c.png)

## Colored planks

> There are 6 differents colors of planks / oak doors / oak trapdoors
![all planks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d5f50d5a8c4cd33acde8e419050283088b3c7f4_0.webp)

## Paintings

> There are 10 paintings from the real game
![paintingss](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4fc7b617441fdf5978f109369daff8c0abaefccf.png)
> and 2 from my imagination
> ![my paintings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4cb6ff3a94acd058077397d598e47637e4cd13c6.png)
